---
title: "About"
format:
  html:
    self-contained: true
    standalone: true
editor: visual
---

About this site

**Euan Ives - Quarto Reports**

With thanks to contributions from analysts in NHS England and throughout the wider health system for resources that we have, no doubt, plagiarised with varying degrees of awareness!

Status: Active

Purpose: To support colleagues in the South West Data and Analytics Team

Audience: South West colleagues, wider analytical colleagues, anyone who may find these resources helpful

Contact: Euan Ives Senior Analyst, South West (euan.ives\@nhs.net)
